sizing_rule.note: Quarterly reallocation of account between active trading (X%) and inactive risk-free assets (100-X%). When active portion reaches 100% drawdown, trading halts until next quarterly reallocation. This is a portfolio-level drawdown-triggered position reduction rule that scales active equity to zero.

source_rule_text: Reallocate portfolio between active trading equity and inactive risk-free assets on a quarterly basis, with option to cease trading if active portion is completely depleted until next quarter reallocation.
